offer: For Etsy sellers processing 10–20 orders/month, manual inventory tracking causes stockouts. We automate inventory monitoring and purchase orders instead of manual inventory tracking and order placement.
problem: Inability to track inventory levels effectively, leading to stockouts.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Engage in community forums for Etsy tools
try_it: Let users try inventory alerts and dashboard on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
